system.description:
LEVEL 3

Cauldroncraft. During a Safe Rest, brew INT+WIL Concoctions in your cauldron. Action: drink a Concoction or throw it as a ranged attack (Reach 6); the target gains the Concoction's effect. Unused Concoctions expire after your next Safe Rest.

Herbal Wisdom. You always know the basic medicinal uses of plants and herbs. During a Field Rest, one ally heals +KEY HP.

LEVEL 7

Mixology. Your Concoctions may have two different effects at the same time.

LEVEL 11

Fast Brew. When you roll Initiative, brew one Concoction. It expires at the end of the encounter.

LEVEL 15

Bottled Echo. When you Fast Brew, you may copy one potion you possess as the Concoction you brew.
